## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and prepare for Marcel's upcoming webinar/workshop on using AI for content marketing and growth](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on showcasing real results and testimonials from past workshop attendees to build credibility](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Highlight that this approach goes beyond just creating content, but leverages AI to augment unique marketing skills](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Spend more time demoing the actual AI workflows and processes to intrigue attendees and drive workshop signups](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Mention flexible pricing options for individuals whose companies may not cover the cost](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Flow and Content

  - [Start with an attention-grabbing hook about AI not replacing jobs, but empowering those who leverage it](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Quickly cover background on Marcel's AI content marketing approach](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Spend more time on the live demo showcasing various AI workflows and capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Share real results and testimonials from past workshop attendees using this approach](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Pitch the upcoming 5-hour hands-on workshop to learn these workflows](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Showcasing Results

  - [Share screenshots of positive feedback from past attendees seeing major growth](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Note this isn't a one-off; consistent results across many workshop participants](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
  - [Highlight standout testimonial about "10x learning speed"](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

### AI Workflow Demos

  - [Walk through full workflow from idea generation to final output](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Showcase capabilities like automated content outlines, optimization, internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Emphasize the "expert-in-the-loop" quality assurance process](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Workshop Promotion

  - [Pitch 5-hour hands-on workshop to learn to build these AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Mention flexible individual pricing if company won't cover](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Offer discount code for attendees](https://fathom.video/share/kq-ezJBzMRrnNhuKX7zw-HNWSCzptzLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
